name: Zucchini Quiche w/ Tomato Topping
recipeIngredient: Pastry for one large or two small pies
2 Cups shredded Mozzarella cheese (or your choice)
1 Large tomatoes, cut into 1/4-inch lengthwise slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring zucchini, onion, salt, and water in a saucepan to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered for 8 minutes or until tender. Drain in a colander.
3. In a large bowl, combine milk, salt, pepper, oregano, and eggs. Beat with a wire whisk until smooth.
4. Add the zucchini mix and cheese. Stir gently to mix and pour into an unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake in a preheated 425-degree oven for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for another 25 minutes.
7. TOPPING: Mix crackers with shredded cheese and oregano. After the quiche is baked, place tomato slices on top in a circle. Sprinkle the cracker mix over the tomatoes. Return to oven until cheese melts.
